positive: A celestial woodland scene, featuring abstract geometric trees and bioluminescent flora growing from moss-covered ground. The main subject is a serene, stylized silhouette of a deer (fawn or doe) grazing beneath the canopy. The style is neo-Art Nouveau mixed with minimalist nature illustration. High contrast is achieved through deep sapphire blues and emerald greens, accented by glowing golden-yellow and pale lavender light sources. The composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed for a seamless apparel print repeat. Emphasis on crisp lines, clean silhouettes, and a magical, dreamlike atmosphere. Flat graphic vector feel with painterly texture accents. Octane render, volumetric lighting.
